metadata.title: Givernance - Infrastructure for European nonprofits
metadata.description: Givernance helps European nonprofits run fundraising, donor stewardship, and reporting in one GDPR-native system, without spreadsheet sprawl.
metadata.ogDescription: Givernance helps European nonprofits run fundraising, donor stewardship, and reporting in one GDPR-native system, without spreadsheet sprawl.

hero.heading: Back your mission. Ditch the spreadsheet sprawl.
hero.description: One system for fundraising, donor stewardship, and reporting, built for European nonprofits. No consultants, no lock-in.
hero.ctaReassurance: Reply within 1 business day · No commitment · Free

trustStrip.heading: Key benefits
trustStrip.gdprDescription: Consent, auditability, and privacy controls built in from the start.
trustStrip.postalDescription: Support the channels nonprofits actually use, not just generic forms.
trustStrip.aiDescription: AI suggests and explains. You confirm what matters.
trustStrip.dataDescription: Export everything, any time. Your records stay yours.

problem.heading: You chose the big platform because it felt safe. Then the work got messy.
problem.description: Rising licence costs, consultant dependency, patchwork compliance, and reporting workarounds in spreadsheets. Sound familiar?
problem.pain1: You pay more every time the team grows
problem.pain2: You depend on consultants for simple changes
problem.pain3: You patch compliance across disconnected tools
problem.pain4: You adapt a US-centric model to European realities
problem.alt1: Predictable pricing that scales with you
problem.alt3: GDPR built in, not bolted on
problem.alt4: Designed for European nonprofits from day one

product.heading: From donations to reporting, in one system.
product.description: Givernance starts with the donor lifecycle, who gives, how much, and why, then connects fundraising, grants, volunteers, and funder reporting around that relationship.
product.postalDescription: Personalised letters, merge fields, and print-ready PDFs — the workflow your team already runs.
product.qrDescription: Every mailing carries a unique QR code so you know exactly which campaign drove which gift.
product.donationDescription: Branded donation pages and embeddable widgets, live in minutes. Connected to your own Stripe account.
product.grantsDescription: Track applications, deadlines, tranches, and funder reporting in one place.
product.impactDescription: Connect outcomes to fundraising and operations data without spreadsheet gymnastics.
product.volunteersDescription: Shifts, hours, background checks, and recognition alongside your constituent records.
product.financeDescription: Export journal entries and fund balances to your accounting system.

ai.heading: Less admin. Same control.
ai.description: Duplicate detection, data clean-up, suggested next steps — AI handles the repetitive work so your team can focus on relationships.
ai.manualDescription: Full human control. AI stays out of the way.
ai.assistedDescription: The default. AI proposes and explains — your team decides.
ai.autopilotDescription: For routine work you trust to run automatically, with clear exceptions and full audit trails.
ai.guardrail: No irreversible action without your confirmation. Every AI decision is logged and auditable.

cta.heading: Ready to see what purpose-built nonprofit software looks like?
cta.description: Book a 30-minute demo tailored to your organisation — covering donor management, campaigns, compliance, and AI-assisted workflows.

footer.brandDescription: Built for European nonprofits. Simple, capable, affordable.
footer.tagline: Built by people who think nonprofits deserve better infrastructure.

dashboard.action1: Send thank-you emails to 26 new donors
dashboard.action2: Review anomaly in QR campaign attribution
dashboard.action3: Confirm Stripe Connect onboarding for Fondation Horizon

demo.heading: See Givernance in action
demo.description: A 30-minute on-screen walkthrough tailored to your organisation — no slides, just the product. We'll show you exactly how Givernance fits your donor management, postal campaigns, and GDPR workflow.
demo.point1: Live demo of the full product
demo.point2: Tailored to your team size and context
demo.formDescription: Fill in the form and we'll reach out to schedule a time.
demo.footerNote: We'll reply within 1 business day. No spam, ever.
demo.successTitle: Thank you — we'll be in touch within 1 business day.
demo.successDescription: We've received your request and will reach out to schedule your demo.
demo.errorFallback: Something went wrong. Please try again.

social.built: Built with Swiss and French nonprofits

earlyAccess.heading:
Built with nonprofits.
Designed to last.
earlyAccess.description: Givernance is being built with pilot organisations in Switzerland and France. It is designed as operational infrastructure for nonprofits, transparent, predictable, and ready for real fundraising work.
earlyAccess.footer: Want to be among the first nonprofits to use Givernance?
